testcase.name: Workday utilities getAllPaymentTerms should return empty array when Response_Data has no Payment_Term

testcase.classname: Workday utilities getAllPaymentTerms should skip entries missing paymentTermsId or name
testcase.name: Workday utilities getAllPaymentTerms should skip entries missing paymentTermsId or name
